{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aurora toad
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The aurora toad is a sign of significance.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
